title: I Love the LORD, for He Has Heard My Voice

verses.text: Anguish of death encompassed me about; Cords of the grave and terror held me down. I was distressed. I called upon his name: “Rescue my soul, O Lord my God, I pray”.
Righteous and gracious is the Lord our God, Rich in his mercy, tender in his love. He will preserve the simple in their need; When I was low, he came and rescued me.
Rest, O my soul; the Lord has blessed you well, For you, O Lord, from death redeemed my soul. You dried my tears, my stumbling feet restored. I’ll walk the land of life before the Lord.
I spoke in anguish, though I still believed: “I’m greatly troubled by my pain and grief.” I am your handmaid’s son, your servant true. I offer thankful sacrifice to you.
What shall I render now unto the Lord for all his benefits on my bestowed? I’ll lift salvation’s cup, and with his saints I’ll pay my vows and call upon his name.

I call upon God’s name with thankful praise. Mid all his people I will pay my vows. Here, in the Lord’s house I will pay my vows, Here, in the Lord’s house, in his temple courts, In you, Jerusalem. O praise the Lord!
